backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining data types and state for an advertising platform (professionals, vendors, locations, production houses) with profile management, recommendations, and role-based access control via MixinAuthorization.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping two completed features—renaming the app to 'AD TRIBE' and redesigning the landing page—to their affected files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Auto-generated text file containing one-line summaries of all frontend source files, serving as a reference index for the project's React components, hooks, pages, and utilities.
frontend/index.css: Root CSS file importing Tailwind directives and defining CSS custom property tokens for light and dark themes (colors, radius, sidebar, charts) used throughout the app.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point titled 'AD TRIBE' that loads the Bebas Neue and Inter fonts from Google Fonts and mounts the React app via main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component that configures TanStack Router with routes for landing, profile, dashboard, and connections pages, enforcing authentication redirects and injecting identity context.
frontend/src/components/calendar/Availab: A monthly calendar component that displays and toggles date availability statuses (available, booked, unavailable) with navigation controls. Supports read-only mode and calls a callback when availability changes.
A simple legend component that displays color-coded labels for the three availability statuses: available (green), booked (amber), and unavailable (red).
frontend/src/components/layout/AppLayout: The main application layout component providing a sticky header with navigation links (Dashboard, Profile, Connections) and an Internet Identity login/logout button, rendering child content below.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Locatio: A form component for creating or editing a shoot location profile, including fields for name, description, capacity, daily rate, and an availability calendar, with data loaded from and saved to the backend.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Product: A form component for creating or editing a production house profile with fields for company name and company information, saving the data to the backend via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/profiles/Profess: A form component for advertising professionals to manage their profile, including name, specialties (tag-based input), portfolio links, and an availability calendar, with load and save functionality.
frontend/src/components/profiles/VendorP: A form component for equipment vendors to manage their profile, including business name, a tag-based equipment inventory list, and an availability calendar, with load and save functionality.
frontend/src/components/ProfileSetup.tsx: Modal dialog for first-time users to select an account type and enter a name, blocking dismissal until the profile is saved via the useSaveCallerUserProfile mutation.
frontend/src/components/search/ProviderC: Displays a card for a provider (professional, vendor, or location) showing their name, availability, type-specific details (specialties/inventory/capacity), and a button to send a connection request.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchBar: A simple search input component with a search icon that accepts a query string and a setter callback.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchFil: A filter component rendering a dropdown to select provider type (all, professional, vendor, or location); accepts dateRange props but does not currently render date filtering UI.
frontend/src/components/search/SearchRes: Fetches all professionals, vendors, and locations, filters them by search query and type, then renders a grid of ProviderCard components or loading skeletons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches an authenticated or anonymous ICP actor using React Query, reinitializing and invalidating dependent queries when the identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context and provider component, managing AuthClient creation, login/logout flow, and persisting identity across page reloads.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for fetching and mutating backend data including user profiles, advertising professionals, equipment vendors, shoot locations, and related entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global CSS file that configures Tailwind and defines CSS custom properties for the AD TRIBE design system's light and dark color themes (amber/gold palette).
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/ConnectionsPage.tsx: Page component that displays a user's professional network with tabs for sent and received connection requests, adapting the UI based on whether the user is a production house.
frontend/src/pages/DashboardPage.tsx: Production house dashboard page that renders a search interface with SearchBar, SearchFilters, and SearchResults components; restricts access to production house profile type only.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page showcasing AD TRIBE features and stats, handling Internet Identity login and redirecting authenticated users to their appropriate page based on profile type.
frontend/src/pages/ProfilePage.tsx: Profile management page that renders the correct profile form component (Professional, Vendor, Location, or ProductionHouse) based on the authenticated user's profile type.
frontend/src/utils/dateHelpers.ts: Utility functions for converting between JavaScript Dates and backend Time (nanosecond BigInt) values, plus helpers for date comparison, formatting, and range generation.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence helpers for maintaining parameters across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration defining the AD TRIBE brand theme including custom amber/charcoal/gold color palettes, display fonts (Bebas Neue), custom shadows, and animation keyframes.
project_state.json: Project state metadata describing the AD TRIBE platform's architecture, implemented features (profiles, availability calendar, dashboard search, connections, visual theme), and current version.
